title: Real-Asset Equity Research Report
description: Agent-fillable output schema for a single 'winning' candidate in the real-asset / supply-chain investment universe (energy transmission, generation, supply, materials, electrification, rare earths, materials production). Designed to be cross-comparable across companies. EVERY value-bearing field is wrapped in a 'datapoint' object carrying its value, source, and quality flag. Agents MUST NOT emit a bare number anywhere a 'datapoint' is expected.

sourceTier.description: Provenance tier. T1=company filing/IR (10-K,10-Q,40-F,annual report,prospectus,MD&A,technical report NI 43-101/JORC). T2=government/regulator (SEC EDGAR, SEDAR+, ASX, USGS, IEA, IRENA, EIA, Eurostat, central banks). T3=industry specialist (trade body, recognized commodity/grid report). T4=reputable media (FT, Reuters, Bloomberg news, Nikkei, regional quality press). T5=data API aggregator (EODHD etc). T6=agent-derived estimate/calculation. LOWER number = more authoritative.

dataQuality.description: A=cross-confirmed by >=2 independent sources OR direct from a T1/T2 filing. B=single credible T1-T4 source, uncontested. C=agent inference/estimate from credible inputs (must show method). D=weak, stale (>18m for fast-moving), contested, or proxy-only. Any 'D' in a decision-critical field must be surfaced in the report's data_quality_warnings.

datapoint.description: Universal wrapper. NO standalone facts allowed in this report — everything traces to a source.

value.description: The fact. Type depends on field (number, string, boolean). Use null + quality D if genuinely unavailable.

as_of.description: Date the fact is true as of (e.g. balance-sheet date, price date, report date).

source_name.description: Human-readable, e.g. 'Company 40-F FY2024', 'USGS MCS 2025 Lithium', 'EODHD fundamentals'.

note.description: Optional: calc method if T6/inferred, caveat, or disambiguation. Required if data_quality is C or D.

scoreItem.description: A single 1-5 rubric score with mandatory justification and the evidence it rests on.

weight.description: Weight within composite. Weights across all scored pillars must sum to 1.0.

rationale.description: Why this score. Must reference specific facts already captured elsewhere in the report.

key_evidence.description: The 1-4 datapoints most responsible for this score.

report_id.description: UUID. Also the dedup key into the analyzed/rejected ticker DB.

candidate_emerged_from.description: 1-2 sentences: which thesis/connection-map path surfaced this name (e.g. 'walked up the grid-transformer supply chain from a US utility capex acceleration to a sole-source GOES electrical-steel supplier').

core_target_profile.description: Restate the unifying thesis in one line: this is mispriced physical optionality on a structural flow. Name (a) the physical chokepoint the company occupies, (b) the structural flow being pushed through it, (c) why it is mispriced/obscure. Forces the agent to confirm the name fits the real mandate, not just a theme keyword.

theme_tags.description: Non-exhaustive and deliberately broad: the themes are instances of the same DNA (real assets + structural flow + under-coverage). If a name fits the core_target_profile but no tag matches, add the closest and note the gap in candidate_emerged_from.

conviction.description: Final verdict. Derived from composite_score + kill-flags, but agent may override down (never silently up) with justification in verdict.override_reason.

position_in_supply_chain.description: Where in the value chain: upstream extraction / processing-refining / component / equipment OEM / EPC / operator-utility / recycler.

discovery_profile.description: PAGE 1 — the measurable case that this name is genuinely under-covered and was reached by reasoning, not by a conventional screen. This is the alpha-source audit trail. Each field is a positive screening input: lower coverage / higher mis-tag / stronger event trigger = higher discovery edge.

entry_path.description: HOW this candidate was reached. 'conventional_screen' is a yellow flag — if true, the bar to proceed should RISE (novelty gate). The other paths are the intended, non-consensus routes.

supply_chain_distance_from_obvious.description: How many steps removed from the obvious beneficiary. 0 = the obvious name everyone covers; 2-3 = the under-covered feedstock/component/processing supplier the flow must pass through (the sweet spot).

coverage_metrics.description: Quantified obscurity. The discovery multiplier rests on these. Use null + quality D where genuinely unobtainable.

sell_side_estimate_count.description: Number of sell-side analysts with published estimates. Lower = more under-covered. 0-2 is the target zone.

institutional_ownership_pct.description: Low can mean under-discovered (good) but watch liquidity. Interpret alongside ADV.

english_news_volume_12m.description: Count of English-language articles last 12m. Low + a real thesis = language-barrier edge.

primary_disclosure_language.description: Language of the primary regulatory filing. Non-English is a structural coverage barrier = edge (if the agent can translate).

days_since_ipo_or_relisting.description: Recent spin-offs/relistings are orphaned by analyst continuity. <540 days is a discovery zone.

sector_tag_mismatch.description: Boolean. TRUE if the exchange/SIC/GICS tag materially misdescribes what the company actually does (e.g. a rare-earth separator filed under generic 'chemicals'). Mis-tagging hides names from thematic screens.

event_trigger.description: If entry_path is event_trigger, the specific change-event that surfaced the name BEFORE consensus reaction. Events re-rate small caps; static filters converge. Null if not event-driven.

trigger_type.description: value enum-like: 'first_offtake'|'permit_granted'|'insider_cluster_buy'|'maturity_refinanced'|'strategic_or_state_investor'|'government_contract_award'|'patent_cluster'|'export_control_or_stockpile'|'customs_flow_shift'|'capacity_qualification'. Source must be a primary regulator/procurement/registry feed.

why_not_yet_priced.description: Why the market hasn't reacted yet — the window of edge.

discovery_edge_summary.description: Synthesize: why is THIS name reachable by your pipeline but missed by the consensus screen? Specific, not generic.

snapshot_financials.description: PAGE 1 — the cross-comparable number block. All companies report these same fields so they line up side by side.

market_cap_usd_m.description: Normalize to USD millions for cross-comparability regardless of listing currency. Note FX rate + date in 'note'.

avg_daily_value_traded_usd_k.description: Liquidity gate. 90-day ADV in USD thousands. Critical for small caps.

is_under_2bn_usd.description: Boolean. Mandate check: target <2B USD market cap.

thesis.description: PAGE 1/2 — the actual pitch. This is what gets read first by a human.

one_paragraph_thesis.description: The core argument: what they own, why the macro/geopolitical tailwind matters, why it's mispriced, what closes the gap. Self-contained.

why_underresearched.description: Concrete evidence of low coverage: analyst count, language barrier, obscure listing, complexity, recent spin/relisting. This is the alpha source — be specific.

macro_geopolitical_tailwind.description: The 2-6yr structural driver and WHY this company is leveraged to it. Tie to a cited T2/T3 source (IEA, USGS, policy).

variant_perception.description: What the agent believes that consensus/the market does not, and why the market is wrong/late.

what_would_break_thesis.description: Falsifiable kill-conditions for the thesis. Forces intellectual honesty.

market_share.description: In its core product/geography, if estimable. Note basis in 'note'.

moat_assessment.description: Source of durable advantage: resource quality/grade, location, permits, long-term contracts, switching costs, scale, IP, regulatory barrier. Real-asset moats are often physical/permitting, not IP.

customer_concentration.description: value = % revenue from top customer (or top 3 — specify in note). High concentration is a real-asset risk.

industry_trends.description: Demand/supply dynamics, capacity additions, pricing direction. Anchor to T2/T3 cited sources.

real_asset_block.description: PAGE 2/3 — THE differentiator for this mandate. Standardized so a miner, a transmission operator, and an electrical-steel maker remain cross-comparable. Fill 'asset_type' then the relevant sub-block; mark inapplicable sub-blocks null with quality note.

asset_quality_summary.description: Plain-language: how good are the physical assets vs peers (grade, location, age, technology, irreplaceability).

ppe_net_usd_m.description: Net PP&E — anchors a real-asset balance sheet (vs IP/goodwill-heavy names you are deliberately avoiding).

ppe_pct_of_assets.description: Tangible-asset intensity. Mandate sanity check: should be HIGH. Low value => possibly wrong universe.

goodwill_intangibles_pct_of_assets.description: Mandate sanity check: should be LOW. Flag if high.

estimated_replacement_value_usd_m.description: Replacement/reinstatement cost of the asset base if estimable. Compare to EV. Often the real-asset margin of safety.

capex_cycle_stage.description: value enum-like: 'greenfield_construction'|'ramp_up'|'sustaining'|'expansion'|'harvest'. Determines FCF profile over the 2-6yr horizon.

capacity_metric.description: Nameplate capacity in natural unit (MW, ktpa, tpa, km of line). Specify unit.

mining_resource.description: Only for miners/resource owners. Source: NI 43-101 / JORC technical report (T1).

ore_grade.description: Grade vs peer average — the single biggest driver of mining economics.

aisc_or_cash_cost.description: All-in sustaining cost per unit. Position on the global cost curve in note.

position_on_cost_curve_pct.description: Percentile (1st quartile = top tier). Survives low prices.

permitting_status.description: value e.g. 'fully_permitted'|'in_progress'|'key_permit_pending'. Binary risk for developers.

jurisdiction_risk.description: Mining-investment-attractiveness of jurisdiction (e.g. Fraser Institute style).

counterparty_quality.description: Investment-grade offtakers? PPA with utility? Government?

commodity_price_sensitivity.description: For price-takers. Quantifies the swing factor.

current_spot_or_term_price.description: Note source. For uranium use term price proxy; for REE oxides use FOB China proxy — both often quality C/D, flag honestly.

ebitda_sensitivity_to_10pct_price.description: Approx % EBITDA change per 10% commodity move. T6/inferred is fine if method shown.

incentive_price_vs_current.description: Price needed to incentivize new global supply vs current — the structural bull/bear setup.

financials_deep.description: PAGE 3 — B/S, I/S, CF, debt. 3-year trend where possible.

cashflow_quality_comment.description: Cash conversion, working-capital swings, capitalized vs expensed, one-offs.

nearest_maturity.description: Date + amount. Refinancing wall = real-asset killer.

liquidity_runway_comment.description: Esp. for pre-revenue developers: months of cash at current burn.

valuation.description: PAGE 3 — generic by design; agent picks the right primary method for the asset type and JUSTIFIES it. Quality of inputs > precision of output.

primary_method.description: Choose the method the asset type warrants (e.g. NAV for miners, EV/EBITDA for operators). Justify below.

skew_comment.description: Is risk/reward asymmetric? Real-asset downside is often floored by asset backing.

key_valuation_assumptions.description: The 2-5 assumptions the value hinges on. Each should map to a datapoint elsewhere.

implied_vs_replacement_value.description: Is EV above or below replacement cost? Margin-of-safety anchor.

peer_construction_logic.description: How peers were chosen (same commodity/stage/geography). Bad peer sets are the #1 cause of false 'cheap' signals.

relative_positioning_comment.description: Is the discount/premium justified by quality, or a genuine mispricing?

ownership_structure.description: Major holders, founder/family/state stakes, free float dynamics.

management_track_record.description: CEO/key exec history — prior value creation/destruction, capital-allocation record. Critical for small caps.

insider_activity.description: Net insider buying/selling last 6-12m. Source: SEC Form 4 / SEDAR+ / local equivalent. value e.g. 'net_buying_2.1m_usd'.

executive_remuneration_comment.description: Alignment: comp vs performance, equity ownership, related-party concerns.

workforce_signals.description: Employee-side signals: headcount trend, hiring/attrition direction, employee-review sentiment (e.g. Glassdoor) and what it implies about culture/execution, key-person dependency, unionization or labour-cost exposure. For real-asset names, watch skilled-operator availability and safety record. Prose, source-flagged where a specific datapoint is cited.

catalysts_risks.description: PAGE 4 — what moves it and what kills it over 2-6yr.

tariff_trade_exposure.description: Explicit per-mandate: import/export exposure, tariff lists, content/origin rules, reshoring beneficiary or victim.

acquisitions_divestments.description: M&A history + likelihood of being acquirer or target.

scoring.description: PAGE 4 — the rubric. Composite drives conviction. Weights MUST sum to 1.0.

asset_quality.description: Physical asset quality, grade/location/irreplaceability, cost-curve position.

balance_sheet_resilience.description: Leverage, maturity wall, dilution risk, liquidity runway.

valuation_gap.description: Upside to fair value AND margin of safety vs asset backing.

macro_geo_tailwind.description: Strength + durability of the 2-6yr structural driver and the company's leverage to it.

underresearched_edge.description: How real and exploitable is the information/coverage gap. MUST be justified by the measured discovery_profile.coverage_metrics (sell-side count, English news volume, mis-tag, days-since-relisting, disclosure language), not asserted. A conventional_screen entry_path caps this score at 2.

composite_score.description: Weighted average of pillar scores. Compute, don't guess.

score_to_conviction_mapping.description: State the rule applied, e.g. '>=4.2 & no high-severity unmitigated risk => SHORTLIST_HIGH; 3.5-4.2 => SHORTLIST; 2.8-3.5 => WATCHLIST; <2.8 => PASS'.

verdict.description: PAGE 4 footer — the decision + monitoring plan.

override_reason.description: Required if recommendation differs from score_to_conviction_mapping output. Agent may only override DOWNWARD.

watchlist_triggers.description: If WATCHLIST: the specific events/prices/filings that would promote it to SHORTLIST (e.g. 'permit granted','price < X','next 10-Q confirms ramp'). Feeds the monitoring agent.

missing_information.description: Known gaps that, if filled, would raise confidence. Feeds funnel stage 4.

position_sizing_note.description: Liquidity-aware: can a meaningful position be built given ADV/float?

self_critique.description: MANDATORY adversarial pass. The agent argues AGAINST its own report before submission.

strongest_bear_case.description: The best argument a smart short-seller would make. Steelman it.

data_quality_warnings.description: Auto-populate: list every decision-critical field carrying quality C or D, with which one.

confirmation_bias_check.description: Did the agent seek disconfirming evidence? What did it find?

uncited_claim_scan_passed.description: TRUE only if a self-scan found zero value-bearing claims without a datapoint wrapper.
